examples: Clad in leather chaps, a denim shirt and a white rancher's hat, he looks the quintessential cowpoke.
He was the quintessential tough guy.
Everybody thinks of him as the quintessential New Yorker.
Depardieu has been one of the quintessential faces of the French silver screen for decades.
Its growth is the quintessential emergent process, characterized by uncertainty and punctuated by discontinuity.
